system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

args.description: Extract secure key id values from haystack
args.prompt:
Read ~/haystack.txt and find every paragraph containing the phrase "secure key id" for entities: Hallow, Idrigil, Jorrith, Kelwick, Larren.

Rules:
- Only include paragraphs that are CONFIRMED by "regional-verification-panel" (or similar confirmed/verified phrasing)
- EXCLUDE any paragraphs marked as "draft", "preliminary", or "superseded" - those are decoys
- Each entity has exactly ONE true value

For each entity, report:
1. The exact value associated with their "secure key id" (including any unit suffix exactly as printed)
2. Whether the paragraph is confirmed or a decoy (so I can verify)

Also report the full sentence/paragraph for each so I can double-check.

tool_returns.detail: File does not exist. Note: your current working directory is ..

args.command: ls -la ~/haystack.txt 2>&1 || echo "File not found at specified path"
